title: Command R Released
description: Cohere released Command R, an open-source large language model optimized for long-context tasks and retrieval augmented generation (RAG). With 128K token context window and strong performance on tool use and RAG benchmarks, it was designed for enterprise applications. Command R balanced high performance with efficiency, making powerful LLMs more accessible for production use.
highlights: Optimized for RAG and tool use

sources.title: Command R: Open Source, RAG-Optimized Model
